title: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild
edition_pinned: Nintendo Switch and Wii U launch edition, March 2017, as pinned by the Tier-1 card.
moat: Shared chemistry and physics rules let elements, materials, and forces solve combat, puzzles, and traversal.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: Reusable state rules let the same objects support traversal, combat, puzzles, survival, and improvisation.
exemplar_rationale: Demonstrates world-first depth through consistent interactions rather than one-off open-world content.

evidence.claim: Nintendo listed the product Genre as: Action; Adventure.
